case_title: MILTON A. MARTINEZ VS. SANTOS CALDERON MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MILTON A MARTINEZ IS PRESENT AT THE TIME THE CASE WAS 1ST CALLED. DEFENDANT SANTOS CALDERON MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES PRESENT ARE RELASED FROM THE COURT AT 1:45P.M AND INFORMED THAT THE MATTER WOULD BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. AT 1:50 P.M. JACQUIE LAPREVOTTE AND SHAWNA VANTREE INFORMS THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DOWNSTAIRS AND THAT PLAINTIFF AND UNSURE OF WHERE HEE NEEDED TO BE. MATTER IS PLACED BACK ON CALENDAR FOR DECEMBER 14, 2022 AT 1:30. DEFENDANT IS CALLED AND A MESSAGE IS LEFT IN SPANISH INFORMING DEFENDANT THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN PLACED BACK ON CALENDAR FOR DECEMBER 14, 2022. NOTICES OF CONTINUANCE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MILTON A.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MILTON A.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MARTINEZ, MILTON A. MARTINEZ, SANTOS CALDERON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MILTON A. MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANTOS CALDERON MARTIINEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER CARINA MARTINEZ/DAUGHTER. MS. MARTINEZ WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH. OTHER APPEARANCES: DEFENDANT WITNESS, NICOLAS REYES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MILTON A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SANTOS CALDERON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IT IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, MILTON A. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SANTOS CALDERON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE OF $40 WAIVED) SERVED SEP-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, SANTOS CALDERON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
